top3.sql:
SELECT s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS avg_writing_score
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499
GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum
ORDER BY avg_writing_score DESC;

SELECT schools.CharterNum, AVG(satscores.AvgScrWrite) AS avg_writing_score
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.AvgScrWrite > 499
GROUP BY schools.CharterNum
ORDER BY avg_writing_score DESC;

SELECT s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS avg_writing_score
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499
GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum
ORDER BY avg_writing_score DESC;

SELECT schools.CharterNum, AVG(satscores.AvgScrWrite) AS avg_writing_score
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.AvgScrWrite > 499
GROUP BY schools.CharterNum
ORDER BY avg_writing_score DESC;

SELECT s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS avg_writing_score
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499
GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum
ORDER BY avg_writing_score DESC;

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.CDSCode, 
        s.CharterNum, 
        AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS avg_writing_score
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
    WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499
    GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum
)
SELECT 
    CDSCode, 
    CharterNum, 
    avg_writing_score,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_writing_score DESC) AS rank
FROM ranked_schools
ORDER BY rank;

SELECT schools.CharterNum, AVG(satscores.AvgScrWrite) AS avg_writing_score
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.AvgScrWrite > 499
GROUP BY schools.CharterNum
ORDER BY avg_writing_score DESC;

final.sql:
SELECT s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS avg_writing_score
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499
GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.CharterNum
ORDER BY avg_writing_score DESC;
